title: Debian package creates unexpected /etc/containers directories
body:
<!--
---------------------------------------------------
BUG REPORT INFORMATION
---------------------------------------------------
Use the commands below to provide key information from your environment:
You do NOT have to include this information if this is a FEATURE REQUEST

**NOTE** A large number of issues reported against Podman are often found to already be fixed
in more current versions of the project.  Before reporting an issue, please verify the
version you are running with `podman version` and compare it to the latest release
documented on the top of Podman's [README.md](../README.md).  If they differ, please
update your version of Podman to the latest possible and retry your command before creating
an issue.

Also, there is a running list of known issues in the [Podman Troubleshooting Guide](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md),
please reference that page before opening a new issue.

If you are filing a bug against `podman build`, please instead file a bug
against Buildah (https://github.com/containers/buildah/issues). Podman build
executes Buildah to perform container builds, and as such the Buildah
maintainers are best equipped to handle these bugs.
-->

**Is this a BUG REPORT or FEATURE REQUEST? (leave only one on its own line)**

/kind bug

**Description**

Debian package creates unexpected /etc/containers directories.

**Steps to reproduce the issue:**

Install podman 3.0.1 from kubic repositories.

```
● cat /etc/apt/sources.list.d/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable.list 
deb https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10/ /

● sudo apt-get install --no-install-recommends podman
The following packages were automatically installed and are no longer required:                                                                       
  containernetworking-plugins containers-golang containers-image                                                                                      
Use 'sudo apt autoremove' to remove them.                                                                                                             
The following additional packages will be installed:                                                                                                  
  conmon containers-common criu crun libnet1 libnl-3-200 libprotobuf-c1 libprotobuf17 libyajl2 podman-plugins python3-protobuf python3-six            
Recommended packages:                                                                                                                                 
  slirp4netns containernetworking-plugins fuse-overlayfs                                                                                              
The following NEW packages will be installed:                                                                                                         
  criu crun libnet1 libnl-3-200 libprotobuf-c1 libprotobuf17 libyajl2 python3-protobuf python3-six                                                    
The following packages will be upgraded:                                                                                                              
  conmon containers-common podman podman-plugins                                                                                                      
4 upgraded, 9 newly installed, 0 to remove and 84 not upgraded.                                                                                       
Need to get 24.6 MB of archives.                                                                                                                      
After this operation, 10.8 MB of additional disk space will be used.                                                                                  
Get:1 https://deb.debian.org/debian buster/main amd64 libprotobuf17 amd64 3.6.1.3-2 [814 kB]                                                          
Get:2 https://deb.debian.org/debian buster/main amd64 python3-six all 1.12.0-1 [15.7 kB]                                                              
Get:3 https://deb.debian.org/debian buster/main amd64 python3-protobuf amd64 3.6.1.3-2 [334 kB]                                                       
Get:4 https://deb.debian.org/debian buster/main amd64 libnet1 amd64 1.1.6+dfsg-3.1 [60.4 kB]                                                          
Get:5 https://deb.debian.org/debian buster/main amd64 libnl-3-200 amd64 3.4.0-1 [63.0 kB]                                                             
Get:6 https://deb.debian.org/debian buster/main amd64 libprotobuf-c1 amd64 1.3.1-1+b1 [26.5 kB]                                                       
Get:7 https://deb.debian.org/debian buster/main amd64 libyajl2 amd64 2.1.0-3 [23.8 kB]                                                                
Get:8 https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10  conmon 100:2.0.27-1 [32.3 kB]                         
Get:9 https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10  containers-common 100:1-15 [49.5 kB]                  
Get:10 https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10  criu 3.15-1 [635 kB]                                 
Get:11 https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10  crun 100:0.18-2 [239 kB]                             
Get:12 https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10  podman-plugins 100:1.1.1-5 [1,115 kB]                
Get:13 https://download.opensuse.org/repositories/devel:/kubic:/libcontainers:/stable/Debian_10  podman 100:3.0.1-2 [21.2 MB]
Fetched 24.6 MB
debconf: delaying package configuration, since apt-utils is not installed
(Reading database ... 89469 files and directories currently installed.)
Preparing to unpack .../00-conmon_100%3a2.0.27-1_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking conmon (100:2.0.27-1) over (2.0.22~1) ...
Preparing to unpack .../01-containers-common_100%3a1-15_all.deb ...
Unpacking containers-common (100:1-15) over (1.2.0~7) ...
Replacing files in old package containers-image (5.8.1~1) ...
Replacing files in old package containers-golang (0.6.0~1) ...
Selecting previously unselected package libprotobuf17:amd64.
Preparing to unpack .../02-libprotobuf17_3.6.1.3-2_amd64.deb ...         
Unpacking libprotobuf17:amd64 (3.6.1.3-2) ...                         
Selecting previously unselected package python3-six.
Preparing to unpack .../03-python3-six_1.12.0-1_all.deb ...
Unpacking python3-six (1.12.0-1) ...          
Selecting previously unselected package python3-protobuf.
Preparing to unpack .../04-python3-protobuf_3.6.1.3-2_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking python3-protobuf (3.6.1.3-2) ...
Selecting previously unselected package libnet1:amd64.
Preparing to unpack .../05-libnet1_1.1.6+dfsg-3.1_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking libnet1:amd64 (1.1.6+dfsg-3.1) ...
Selecting previously unselected package libnl-3-200:amd64.
Preparing to unpack .../06-libnl-3-200_3.4.0-1_amd64.deb ...

Selecting previously unselected package libprotobuf-c1:amd64.
Preparing to unpack .../07-libprotobuf-c1_1.3.1-1+b1_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking libprotobuf-c1:amd64 (1.3.1-1+b1) ...
Selecting previously unselected package criu.
Preparing to unpack .../08-criu_3.15-1_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking criu (3.15-1) ...
Selecting previously unselected package libyajl2:amd64.
Preparing to unpack .../09-libyajl2_2.1.0-3_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking libyajl2:amd64 (2.1.0-3) ...
Selecting previously unselected package crun.
Preparing to unpack .../10-crun_100%3a0.18-2_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking crun (100:0.18-2) ...
Preparing to unpack .../11-podman-plugins_100%3a1.1.1-5_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking podman-plugins (100:1.1.1-5) over (1.1.1~1) ...
Preparing to unpack .../12-podman_100%3a3.0.1-2_amd64.deb ...
Unpacking podman (100:3.0.1-2) over (2.2.1~4) ...
Setting up libyajl2:amd64 (2.1.0-3) ...
Setting up libnet1:amd64 (1.1.6+dfsg-3.1) ...
Setting up libprotobuf-c1:amd64 (1.3.1-1+b1) ...
Setting up python3-six (1.12.0-1) ...
Setting up conmon (100:2.0.27-1) ...
Setting up containers-common (100:1-15) ...
Installing new version of config file /etc/containers/registries.conf ...
Installing new version of config file /etc/containers/storage.conf ...
Setting up podman-plugins (100:1.1.1-5) ...
Setting up libnl-3-200:amd64 (3.4.0-1) ...
Setting up libprotobuf17:amd64 (3.6.1.3-2) ...
Setting up python3-protobuf (3.6.1.3-2) ...
Setting up criu (3.15-1) ...
Setting up crun (100:0.18-2) ...
Setting up podman (100:3.0.1-2) ...
Processing triggers for libc-bin (2.28-10) ...
Processing triggers for man-db (2.8.5-2) ...
```

**Describe the results you received:**

`/etc/containers/{certs.d,oci` and `/etc/containers/{certs.d,oci/hooks.d}` look suspicious.

```
● ls -ld /etc/containers/**
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root   294 May  8 14:48 /etc/containers/
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root    16 May  8 14:48 /etc/containers/{certs.d,oci
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root     0 Apr 26 07:58 /etc/containers/{certs.d,oci/hooks.d}
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root 13033 Dec  9 13:23 /etc/containers/containers.conf
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root    31 Jan  9 13:38 /etc/containers/containers.conf.orig -> containers.conf.orig.containers
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root   256 Dec  9 13:23 /etc/containers/policy.json
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root    27 Jan  9 13:38 /etc/containers/policy.json.orig -> policy.json.orig.containers
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  3808 Apr 26 07:58 /etc/containers/registries.conf
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root    38 May  8 14:48 /etc/containers/registries.conf.d
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  2816 Apr 26 07:58 /etc/containers/registries.conf.d/000-shortnames.conf
drwxr-xr-x 1 root root    88 May  8 14:48 /etc/containers/registries.d
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root   894 Dec  9 13:23 /etc/containers/registries.d/default.yaml
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root    28 Jan  9 13:38 /etc/containers/registries.d/default.yaml.orig -> default.yaml.orig.containers
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  1874 Dec  9 13:23 /etc/containers/registries.d/shortnames.conf
-rw-r--r-- 1 root root  7834 Apr 26 07:58 /etc/containers/storage.conf
lrwxrwxrwx 1 root root    28 Jan  9 13:38 /etc/containers/storage.conf.orig -> storage.conf.orig.containers
```

**Describe the results you expected:**

Directories without brackets. Perhaps symlinks that point somewhere.

**Additional information you deem important (e.g. issue happens only occasionally):**

**Output of `podman version`:**

```
podman version 3.0.1
```

**Package info (e.g. output of `rpm -q podman` or `apt list podman`):**

```
Listing... Done
podman/unknown,now 100:3.0.1-2 amd64 [installed]
podman/unknown 100:3.0.1-2 arm64
podman/unknown 100:3.0.1-2 armhf
podman/unknown 100:3.0.1-2 ppc64el
podman/unknown 100:3.0.1-2 s390x
```

**Have you tested with the latest version of Podman and have you checked the Podman Troubleshooting Guide? (https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/troubleshooting.md)**

Yes

**Additional environment details (AWS, VirtualBox, physical, etc.):**

Crostini on ChromeOS stable: Version 90.0.4430.100 (Official Build) (64-bit)

```
● lsb_release --all
No LSB modules are available.
Distributor ID: Debian
Description:    Debian GNU/Linux 10 (buster)
Release:        10
Codename:       buster
```

comments.body: A friendly reminder that this issue had no activity for 30 days.
should be fixed in the latest containers-common at https://build.opensuse.org/package/show/devel:kubic:libcontainers:stable/containers-common . Closing...
